jobs.title: Calibration Algorithm Engineer
key_matches: Experience with data analysis and model validation
Strong analytical mindset and collaborative spirit
key_gaps: Focus on calibration algorithms may not align directly with systems neuroscience
Requires MSc which may imply a preference for less experienced candidates
jobs.rationale: The role aligns well with Ben's programming skills and analytical experience, but the focus on calibration and the MSc requirement introduce some gaps.

jobs.title: Sensing Architect (hardware & algorithm)
key_matches: Strong skills in Python and MATLAB
Experience with data analysis and modeling
key_gaps: Focus on sensing systems rather than neuroscience
Requires MSc or PhD in a different field
jobs.rationale: While Ben has relevant skills in data analysis and modeling, the role's focus on sensing systems and the requirement for an MSc or PhD in a different field limit its alignment with his profile.
